title: test_auth_login_with_valid_and_invalid_credentials
description: Verify POST /api/v1/auth/login authenticates users with valid email and password, returns 200 with accessToken and refreshToken; invalid credentials return 401 error.

title: test_auth_signup_and_otp_verification_flow
description: Verify POST /api/v1/auth/signup registers a new customer, sends OTP with expiry; POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp validates correct OTP and returns 200; invalid or expired OTP returns 400.

title: test_users_profile_retrieval_and_update
description: Verify GET /api/v1/users/profile returns current user profile for authenticated users; PATCH /api/v1/users/profile updates profile fields and returns updated user.

title: test_users_customer_branch_selection_and_role_restriction
description: Verify PATCH /api/v1/users/me/branch allows customers to select preferred branch and returns updated user; non-customer roles receive 403 error.

title: test_branches_crud_and_manager_performance_view
description: Verify POST /api/v1/branches creates branch with admin role; GET /api/v1/branches lists branches; GET /api/v1/branches/:id returns branch details; GET /api/v1/branches/my-performance returns manager's branch KPIs; PATCH /api/v1/branches/:id/toggle-active toggles branch active state.

title: test_products_catalog_crud_and_image_upload
description: Verify POST /api/v1/products creates product with admin/manager roles; GET /api/v1/products lists products; GET /api/v1/products/:id returns product details; PATCH /api/v1/products/:id updates product; POST /api/v1/products/:id/image uploads product image with size limit; DELETE /api/v1/products/:id/image deletes product image.

title: test_pos_checkout_idempotency_and_validation
description: Verify POST /api/v1/pos/transactions creates legacy sale with idempotency key; duplicate requests with same key return 409; POST /api/v1/pos/sales creates multi-tender sale with validation for exclusive customerUserId or loyaltyCustomerId; invalid payload returns 400.

title: test_stock_transfers_state_machine_and_branch_enforcement
description: Verify POST /api/v1/stock-transfers creates pending transfer request; PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/approve approves with source branch and quantity; PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/ship enforces source branch and updates status; PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/receive enforces destination branch and completes transfer; invalid branch access returns 403.

title: test_customer_orders_creation_and_status_transitions
description: Verify POST /api/v1/customer-orders creates pickup order with optional online payment; GET /api/v1/customer-orders/mine lists own orders; PATCH /api/v1/customer-orders/:id/cancel allows customer to cancel order; PATCH /api/v1/customer-orders/:id/accept allows staff to accept order; POST /api/v1/customer-orders/code/:code/fulfill processes fulfillment with cash payment; invalid actions return appropriate errors.

title: test_notifications_list_view_and_mark_read
description: Verify GET /api/v1/notifications lists own notifications; GET /api/v1/notifications/:id returns notification details with ownership check; PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/read marks notification as read without ownership check; PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read-all marks all own notifications as read.
